chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI c.P NO.D-5987 t2015 Date Order with signature of Judge 1 2 J For order on Misc. 30185/2015 For order on Misc. 30'l 86/2015 For katcha peshi. 28.09.2015 pl Mr. Rahman Dino Mahesar, advocate. This petition has been fited on the ground that the Returning Officers have refused to accept the nomination papers of the petitioners. The nomination papers are to be submitted atorrgwith the paid chaLtan of the requisite fee. This would have estabtished that on the last date i.e, 17.09.2015 the petitioners attempted to submit their nomination papers. As fee was not even paid, we cannot interfere at this stage as it woutd interrupt the entire etection process. The petition alongwith the pending apptications is, thet efore, dismissed.
